title: Ranchitas Buffalo Ranch Spicy Chicken and Cheese Dip
ingredients: 1/4 cup Mexican crema or sour cream
1 bag of Ranchitas Buffalo Ranch chips for serving
Chopped chives or parsley for serving
instructions: Step 1. In a skillet, heat the shredded chicken over medium heat and add the hot sauce, mixing until the chicken is well coated and hot.
Step 2. Add the cream cheese and cook, stirring constantly, until melted and creamy.
Step 3. Add the shredded cheese and continue cooking until completely melted.
Step 4. Remove from heat and stir in the crema to balance the spiciness.
Step 5. Serve hot with Ranchitas Buffalo Ranch chips and finish with chopped chives or parsley before serving.
description: A creamy and spicy buffalo chicken and cheese dip, perfect for dipping with crunchy Ranchitas Buffalo Ranch chips. Ideal for sharing at any gathering.
